'''thachotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myclobutanil|myclobutanil]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myclobutanil|myclobutanil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thachotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæchetheth|thæchetheth]] || [[word:thæchethej|thæchethej]] || [[word:thæchethesh|thæchethesh]] || [[word:thæchethe|thæchethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thachochothoth|thachochothoth]] || [[word:thachochothoj|thachochothoj]] || [[word:thachochothosh|thachochothosh]] || [[word:thachochotho|thachochotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachothoth|thachothoth]] || [[word:thachothoj|thachothoj]] || [[word:thachothosh|thachothosh]] || [[word:thachotho|thachotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachofthofth|thachofthofth]] || [[word:thachofthofj|thachofthofj]] || [[word:thachofthofsh|thachofthofsh]] || [[word:thachofthof|thachofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thachothotho|thachothotho]] || [[word:thachothojo|thachothojo]] || [[word:thachothosho|thachothosho]] || [[word:thachothoko|thachothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thachothoth|thachothoth]] || [[word:thachothoj|thachothoj]] || [[word:thachothosh|thachothosh]] || [[word:thachotho|thachotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thachothothol|thachothothol]] || [[word:thachothojol|thachothojol]] || [[word:thachothoshol|thachothoshol]] || [[word:thachothokol|thachothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thachothoothotho|thachothoothotho]] || [[word:thachothoojojo|thachothoojojo]] || [[word:thachothooshosho|thachothooshosho]] || [[word:thachothooko|thachothooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thachothothon|thachothothon]] || [[word:thachothojon|thachothojon]] || [[word:thachothoshon|thachothoshon]] || [[word:thachothokon|thachothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thachothothooro|thachothothooro]] || [[word:thachothojooro|thachothojooro]] || [[word:thachothoshooro|thachothoshooro]] || [[word:thachothokooro|thachothokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
